name: bioethics_communications_outage_forces_harbor_tru_loy
premise: A clinical ethics consult is running concurrent with treatment decisions where consent capacity and harm tradeoffs are unclear. The chart, the family, and the research integrity requirements do not line up cleanly. The situation maps to internal runbooks and external messaging tied to: bioethics communications outage forces harbor tru loy. The moral tension is explicitly framed as truth versus loyalty: leadership cannot fully satisfy both without accepting tradeoffs. A union steward and a patient-family advocate are both on the bridge demanding incompatible assurances. Telemetry and logs are diverging; the SOC lead will freeze writes in twelve minutes if no accountable owner signs off. Treat unverified telemetry as hypothesis; do not assert facts you cannot support from retained logs. Any exception must be time-boxed, named, and reversible where technically feasible.

agents.name: Mira Ibrahim
agents.identity: I am Mira Ibrahim, the accountable decision-maker on this Bioethics bridge; I own what gets logged, communicated, and executed in the next window.
agents.goal: I need to stop the bleeding without baking in a rule that later punishes loyalty whenever someone invokes truth.

agents.name: Zara Chandra
agents.identity: I am Zara Chandra, responsible for surfacing who gets protected last when systems fail; I am watching for silent harm and unfair distribution.
agents.goal: I want safeguards so loyalty is not sacrificed by default just because truth feels morally loud in the moment.

choices: I will choose a narrow, time-boxed authorization with explicit human override, subgroup monitoring, and a hard stop if harm indicators rise—accepting slower relief to protect loyalty.

I will choose a broad immediate authorization to stabilize outcomes fast, with transparent metrics and rapid correction afterward—accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: External parties will infer a decision if none is posted. With partial evidence, Mira Ibrahim must decide under truth versus loyalty. What does Mira Ibrahim do?
